rules.title: Community rules
items: Respect the release pace and publishing decisions of the group.
Do not reupload our releases to other sites without permission.
Do not remove staff credits, notes, or release information.
Use official channels if you want to report broken chapters or missing pages.
Keep contact with the team respectful and concise.

recruitment.title: We are recruiting
recruitment.summary: We are looking for a few reliable people who want to help us release chapters on a steady schedule.

roles.title: Translator
roles.description: Comfortable reading Japanese, Korean, or Chinese source material and turning it into clear English.

contact.label: Apply via Discord
contact.value: Open a ticket in our Discord server or message the team lead directly.
